resource.name: nodoublegrouping
resource.object: Can't group on both base material and quality. Configure the user interface item properly.

resource.name: ConfigurationError
resource.object: Packing station is incorrectly configured. Please contact your supervisor

resource.name: ConfigurationError
resource.object: PackingStation is incorrectly configured. Please contact your supervisor

resource.name: noRecTimeFrame
resource.object: No recording because of time limit.

resource.name: CloseWithPackagingFailed
resource.object: Closing pallet with new packaging failed

resource.name: PackIsFullNewPack
resource.object: Current pack is full, please replace the current pack with a new one.

resource.name: WaitingForPackService
resource.object: Waiting for packing service to initialize

resource.name: PackOperationConfiguration
resource.object: Bad configuration of packing operation, possibly missing a CommitTransaction

resource.name: IdContainerIdNotInteger
resource.object: Id for id container is not an integer: {0}

resource.name: IdContainerNotFound
resource.object: Id container not found from barcode: {0}

resource.name: limitReached
resource.object: Order line limit is reached.\nDo you want to reopen the order line and continue adding to it?

resource.name: BulkLabelMaxLimit
resource.object: Number of labels too high maximum is :

resource.name: LotChangeNotAllowed
resource.object: Process unit does not allow lot change

resource.name: DestinationLotChanged
resource.object: Changed lot on destination process unit

resource.name: orderLineComplete
resource.object: Continue packing to the order line?

resource.name: DoClearCounter
resource.object: Do you want to clear the counter?

resource.name: DoDeletePack
resource.object: Do you want to delete last pack?

resource.name: ExtCodeMessage
resource.object: The pack linked to the created item is missing a ExtCode

resource.name: BarcodeNotHandled
resource.object: The barcode was not handled check the log for more information.

resource.name: unableToInterpretIdContainer
resource.object: Unable to interpret code for IdContainer: {0}

resource.name: unableToInterpretMaterial
resource.object: Unable to interpret code for Material: {0}

resource.name: unableToInterpretFilter
resource.object: Unable to interpret code for filter: {0}

resource.name: unableToInterpretPrDayOffset
resource.object: Unable to interpret code for PrDayOffset: {0}

resource.name: unableToInterpretInputField
resource.object: Unable to interpret code for input field: {0}

resource.name: IdContainerNoPLot
resource.object: Id container has no production lot: {0}

resource.name: IdContainerNotFoundFromRail
resource.object: Id container not found from rail: {0}

resource.name: DoStartNextProduct
resource.object: Are you sure you want to start next product?

resource.name: noRecTimeFrame
resource.object: No recording because of time limit.

resource.name: OrderLineWasCreated
resource.object: A new order line was created

resource.name: PackStillOpenMessage
resource.object: The current pack is still open. Do you need to close this pack?

resource.name: doDeletePack
resource.object: Do you want to delete the pack?

resource.name: PackStillOpenMessage
resource.object: The current pack is still open. Do you need to close this pack?

resource.name: doClosePallet
resource.object: Do you want to close last pallet?

resource.name: doPrintPack
resource.object: Do you want to print the pack?

resource.name: ItemWhileNotInScanMode
resource.object: Cannot assign item to pack while in '{0}' mode

resource.name: ItemAlreadyAssignedToSelectedPack
resource.object: Item already assigned to the selected pack.

resource.name: ItemAlreadyAssignedToAPack
resource.object: Item already assigned to a pack.

resource.name: PackOnAnotherOrder
resource.object: Pack is assigned to another order.

resource.name: noRecTimeFrame
resource.object: No recording because of time limit

resource.name: doDeletePack
resource.object: Do you want to delete last pack?

resource.name: doDeleteItem
resource.object: Do you want to delete last item?

resource.name: doDeleteTransaction
resource.object: Do you want to delete last transaction?

resource.name: noItemContentSpec
resource.object: Product has no item content specs. Value cannot be changed.

resource.name: noRecTimeFrame
resource.object: No recording because of time limit

resource.name: doDeletePack
resource.object: Do you want to delete last pack?

resource.name: doDeleteItem
resource.object: Do you want to delete last item?

resource.name: doDeleteTransaction
resource.object: Do you want to delete last transaction?

resource.name: doPrintPack
resource.object: Do you want to re-print last pack?

resource.name: doPrintItem
resource.object: Do you want to re-print last item?

resource.object: Do you want to delete the item?

resource.name: doPrintItem
resource.object: Do you want to re-print the item?

resource.object: Do you want to delete the pack?

resource.name: doPrintPack
resource.object: Do you want to re-print the pack label?

resource.object: Can't group on both base material and quality. Configure the user interface item properly.

resource.name: noRecTimeFrame
resource.object: No recording because of time limit

resource.name: piecesInputMissing
resource.object: You must specify number of pieces

resource.name: batchInputMissing
resource.object: You must specify a batch number

resource.name: doDeletePack

resource.name: doPrintPack
resource.object: Do you want to print the pack?

resource.name: doRemovePack

resource.name: errorAdding
resource.object: An error occured while creating new checkweigher list.

resource.name: cancelEditError
resource.object: An error ocurred while cancelling changes.

resource.name: errorCloning
resource.object: An error occured while cloning checkweigher list.

resource.name: saveDataError
resource.object: An error ocurred while saving data.

resource.name: loadProductsError
resource.object: An error ocurred while retrieving products.

resource.name: getDevieceParamsError
resource.object: An error ocurred while getting device specific parameters.

resource.name: setDevieceParamsError
resource.object: An error ocurred while setting device specific parameters.

resource.name: updateActivityError
resource.object: An error occured while updating activity.

resource.name: InvalidPrunit
resource.object: Please select a process unit and click confirm again

resource.name: InvalidProgramNumber
resource.object: Please enter a valid number (positive integer) as program number and click confirm again

resource.name: InvalidProgramNumberInUse
resource.object: The program number entered is in use, next vacant number inserted instead

resource.name: listUnsavedWarningLabel.Text
resource.object: Please fill in data in the General box and click Confirm. Then add more General data if needed, add Product line(s) and click Confirm again.

resource.name: noRecTimeFrame
resource.object: No recording because of time limit

resource.name: selDevice.ToolTip
resource.object: Select type of device this list is for

resource.name: tolunder.hint
resource.object: Lower tolerance in unit set by weight unit

resource.name: tolover.hint
resource.object: Upper tolerance in unit set by weight unit

resource.name: target.hint
resource.object: Target in unit set by weight unit

resource.name: weightres.hint
resource.object: Weight res in unit set by weight unit

resource.name: weightunit.hint
resource.object: Set weight units for:\ntarget, lower and upper tolerance\nand Weight res for the product.

resource.name: Err.MaterialInUse
resource.object: Material already in use.\nPlease select another material

resource.name: Err.GetDeviceParams
resource.object: An error ocurred while getting device specific parameters.

resource.name: Err.SetDeviceParams
resource.object: An error ocurred while setting device specific parameters.

resource.name: ChangeParam.Warning
resource.object: Do you want to change the parameter set?\nChanging causes the current set to be cleared.

resource.name: LoadFile.Info
resource.object:
You can only load program that have been saved with this system,
or system with the same database setup.

Do you want to continue?

resource.name: SaveFile.Info
resource.object:
Program saved by this system can only by loaded again to this system,
or system with the same database setup.

Do you want to continue?

resource.name: ClearProducts.Text
resource.object: Do you wan't to remove all products from the list?

resource.name: ImportProduct.SelectList
resource.object: Please select parameter template before import.

resource.name: ImportProduct.InfoText
resource.object:
Items will be appended to existing list.
Settings for: pack op, material and data in Content Specification will not be imported.
After the import you will have to manually set those items.
A report will be available which can aid you in this process.

Do you want to continue?

resource.name: ExportProduct.InfoText
resource.object: Please select the default packing operation for the products.\n\nPress Export to continue.

resource.name: btnGridImportProducts.Hint
resource.object: Click to load a product list from file

resource.name: btnGridExportProducts.Hint
resource.object: Click to save the product list to file

resource.name: btnGridClearList.Hint
resource.object: To remove all entries from the list

resource.name: btnGridImportReport.Hint
resource.object: To view report of last product load

resource.name: edWeightRes.ToolTip
resource.object: Resolution for weight histograms\nIn system unit.

resource.name: Err.G300Split
resource.object: Sum of all scales may not exceed 7 and sum of split count can not exceed max count in program definition. The count value can also never be more then twice the scale value.

resource.name: Err.G300MinBins
resource.object: Min value may not exceed max value.

resource.name: btnRefresh.Hint
resource.object: To request a status and data from lane

resource.name: btnClear.Hint
resource.object: Clears monitor data both in UI and server

resource.name: btnConnect.Hint
resource.object: To requests a connection to station server

resource.name: selectSystem.Hint
resource.object: To choose a system to monitor stations on

resource.name: btnActivateAll.Hint
resource.object: Click to activate all process in all stations

resource.name: ClearData.Txt
resource.object: Clears monitor data from UI and station.\n\nDo you want to continue?

resource.name: chkAutoConnect.ToolTip
resource.object: If active then the program will try automatically to connect to the station if the connection is down.

resource.name: chkDataPull.ToolTip
resource.object: If active then program will automatically pull for data from server.

resource.name: edHistorySize.ToolTip
resource.object: Set how many minutes backwards from current time to show.

resource.name: colDisplay.ToolTip
resource.object: Tells if this item shall be visible on the panel.

resource.name: colOrder.ToolTip
resource.object: Set in which order the item is placed on the panel.

resource.name: colLine.ToolTip
resource.object: Set which items are together in line.

resource.name: chkAutoConnect.ToolTip
resource.object: If active then the program will try automatically to connect to the station if the connection is down.

resource.name: chkDataPull.ToolTip
resource.object: If active then program will automatically pull for data from server.

resource.name: edHistorySize.ToolTip
resource.object: Set how many minutes backwards from current time to show.

resource.name: itemProgram.LookupBox.ToolTip
resource.object: To choose pending program for station

resource.name: itemProduct.LookupBox.ToolTip
resource.object: To choose active or pending product for station

resource.name: ProdDateActivity.Confirm
resource.object: Do you want to change production date to:

resource.name: btnActivate.ToolTip
resource.object: Click to activate all pending processes

resource.name: ErrorSetLot.StartPending
resource.object: You are not allowed to start pending lot for this process unit

resource.name: ErrorSetLot.Activate
resource.object: Can not set active lot for this process unit

resource.name: ErrorSetLot.SetPending
resource.object: Can not set pending lot for this process unit

resource.name: ErrorSetPo.StartPending
resource.object: You are not allowed to start pending purchase order for this process unit

resource.name: ErrorSetPo.Activate
resource.object: Can not set active purchase order for this process unit

resource.name: ErrorSetPo.SetPending
resource.object: Can not set pending purchase order for this process unit

resource.name: ErrorSetProgram.StartPending
resource.object: You are not allowed to start pending activity for this process unit

resource.name: ErrorSetProgram.Activate
resource.object: Can not set active activity for this process unit

resource.name: ErrorSetProgram.SetPending
resource.object: Can not set pending activity for this process unit

resource.name: NoLiveView
resource.object: Station does not support live data

resource.name: uThroughput.ToolTip
resource.object: Click to toggle between w/min and w/hour.

resource.name: radioGroup.ToolTip
resource.object: Select weight count or piece count

resource.name: chkShowTrendRejected.ToolTip
resource.object: Shows throughput of accepted and rejected items

resource.name: btnSHProducts.ToolTip
resource.object: Minimize or maximize the product panel

resource.name: btnSHTotals.ToolTip
resource.object: Minimize or maximize the total panel

resource.name: ClearData.Txt
resource.object: Clears monitor data from UI and station.\n\nDo you want to continue?

resource.name: productLookup.ToolTip
resource.object: List of products to view detail for.

resource.name: packagingTareNeeded
resource.object: Pallet tare must be greater than zero.

resource.name: BtnIsPending.ToolTip
resource.object: Click to see current active process

resource.name: BtnIsActive.ToolTip
resource.object: Click to see current pending process

resource.name: BtnCancel.ToolTip
resource.object: Click to cancel pending or selection

resource.name: Info.SelectImportDevice
resource.object: Select device to import program(s) from:

resource.name: Info.SelectExportDevice
resource.object: Select device to export program(s) to:

resource.name: PrgStatus.ExportProgramNoProgramNumber
resource.object: Failed to export program due to missing program number

resource.name: PrgStatus.SyncProgramError
resource.object: Error occured when synchronizing program with checkweigher

resource.name: PrgStatus.ExportProgramTooManyProducts
resource.object: Failed to export program due to too many products defined in program

resource.name: PrgStatus.ExportProgramNoProduct
resource.object: Failed to export program due to no valid product defined in program

resource.name: NoQCProcedure
resource.object: No inspection procedure defined for product

resource.name: DeleteQueue
resource.object: Do you want to remove box from queue?

resource.name: DeletBox
resource.object: Do you want to delete box?

resource.name: DeleteWarningAllPacksMsg
resource.object: Are you sure you want to remove all packs?

resource.name: DeleteWarningPackMsg
resource.object: Do you want to remove box?

resource.name: CustomButtonTipSV4700
resource.object: Calculate weights settings used by regulator, based on nominal weight and weight limits

resource.name: btnCalcTNE.Hint
resource.object: Calculates T1, T2 and TO/MaxWeight based on Nominal weight

resource.name: WarningContentSpecMultiUse
resource.object: Content specification is assigned to product. \nContent specification may be used by more than one product or product in other programs. \nChanging weight settings may affect more than this program.

resource.name: WarningNoContentSpec
resource.object: Selected product has no content specification defined.

resource.name: setDefaultButton.Hint
resource.object: The current device settings are used as default values. Creating a new program will use these default values.

resource.name: hideShowButton.Hint
resource.object: Decide which device settings should be visible

resource.name: saveButton.Hint
resource.object: Saves which device settings are visible

resource.name: NotValidated
resource.object: Program has not been validated yet or has been changed since last validation.

resource.name: viewModeButton.Hint
resource.object: Switch between viewing program headers as panel or grid

resource.name: cloneButton.Hint
resource.object: Makes a clone of the current program. \nProcess unit may then be changed if needed.

resource.name: deleteButton.Hint
resource.object: Deletes the current program. \nProgram is also deleted on checkweigher if it supports deleting programs from Innova

resource.name: refreshButton.Hint
resource.object: Refreshes the list of programs. \nUncomitted changes to programs are lost.

resource.name: confirmButton.Hint
resource.object: Confirms all changes and saved to database.

resource.name: validateButton.Hint
resource.object: Lets the checkweigher check if the current program is valid for running on this checkweigher.

resource.name: advancedButton.Hint
resource.object: Swithes between showing or hiding advanced program fields.

resource.name: addJobButton.Hint
resource.object: Add another job (product) to the program.

resource.name: removeJobButton.Hint
resource.object: Remove currently selected job (product) from the program.

resource.name: unsupportedTypeLabel.Text
resource.object: The currently selected process unit belongs to an unsupported checkweigher type.

resource.name: newProgramLabel.Text
resource.object: Please fill in values in the upper part and then click Confirm. \nThen fill in the lower details and press Confirm again.

resource.name: updateActivityError
resource.object: An error occured while updating activity.

resource.name: DeleteDialogText
resource.object: Are you sure you want to delete this program? \n\nThe program will also be deleted on the checkweigher.

resource.name: DeleteDialogMachineFailedText
resource.object: Failed to delete the program from the machine. Deletion aborted.\n

resource.name: DeleteDialogActiveOnMachineText
resource.object: Cannot delete the program when it is active on the machine\n

resource.name: DeleteDialogUnknownProgramText
resource.object: Deleting the program failed. Unknown program.\n

resource.name: DeleteDialogOffline
resource.object: Deleting the program failed. Checkweigher is offline.\n

resource.name: DeleteDialogDatabaseFailedText
resource.object:
Deleting the program from the database failed.

See log for details.

resource.name: InvalidProgramNumber
resource.object: The program number entered is not valid, next vacant number used instead

resource.name: InvalidProgramNumberInUse
resource.object: The program number entered is already used, next vacant number used instead

resource.name: ContentMsgBox_Head
resource.object: Innova has detected that that following programs have been created using the old Checkweighing program editor,

resource.name: ContentMsgBox_Head2
resource.object: this means that the weighing parameters are kept in content specifications assigned to the product.

resource.name: ContentMsgBox_Head3a
resource.object: A drawback of this approach is that changing weighing parameters in one program might affect other programs as

resource.name: ContentMsgBox_Head3b
resource.object: the same product or content specification can be used in more than one checkweigher program.

resource.name: ContentMsgBox_Text1a
resource.object: This can be fixed automatically by upgrading these programs to the structure used by the new checkweigher program editor

resource.name: ContentMsgBox_Text1b
resource.object: (creating new local, private content specifications connected directly to the checkweigher program, these are not visible in the content specifications grid).

resource.name: ContentMsgBox_Text2
resource.object: No program parameters will be changed in this process.

resource.name: ContentMsgBox_Text3
resource.object: The new checkweigher program editor is compatible with programs created by the old editor, but after upgrading the programs the old editor can no longer be used.

resource.name: ContentMsgBox_Quest
resource.object: Do you wish to upgrade these programs (recommended)?

resource.name: doCloseCurrentPack
resource.object: Do you want to close the current pack?

resource.name: doClosePack
resource.object: Do you want to close the last pack?

resource.name: StepLimitsOutOfRange
resource.object: Nominal step limits out of range. Check content specifications

resource.name: Clone.CloneRecord
resource.object: Do you want to clone this record?

resource.name: Alarm.WrongDeviceType
resource.object: The selected device does not support importing alarms.

resource.name: ProgramSchema.WrongDeviceType
resource.object: The selected device does not support importing program schemas.

resource.name: radioGroup.ToolTip
resource.object: Select weight count or piece count

resource.name: chkShowTrendRejected.ToolTip
resource.object: Shows throughput of accepted and rejected items

resource.name: Toolbox.CheckDistribution.Hint
resource.object: Show weight distribution by check status

resource.name: noRecTimeFrame
resource.object: No recording because of time limit.

resource.name: noProduct
resource.object: You must select a product before recording.

resource.name: doDeleteItem
resource.object: Do you want to delete the item?

resource.name: doDeletePack
resource.object: Do you want to delete the pack?

resource.name: doPrintPack
resource.object: Do you want to print the pack?

resource.name: doCloseAllPacks
resource.object: Do you want to close all open packs?

resource.name: doClosePallet
resource.object: Do you want to close last pallet?

resource.name: doPrintPallet
resource.object: Do you want to print last pallet?

resource.name: doOpenPallet
resource.object: Do you want to open last pallet?

resource.name: MsgBoxTxt_AreYou SureYouWantToDeleteThe
resource.object: Are you sure you want to delete the

resource.name: barButtonRefresh.Hint
resource.object: Refreshes the list of programs. \nUncomitted changes to programs are lost.

resource.name: barButtonDelete.Hint
resource.object: Deletes the current program. \nProgram is also deleted on the Multihead weigher

resource.name: barButtonImport.Hint
resource.object: Import programs form the Multihead weigher

resource.name: barButtonExport.Hint
resource.object: Export programs to the Multihead weigher

resource.name: barButtonClone.Hint
resource.object: Makes a clone of the current program. \nProcess unit may then be changed if needed.

resource.name: barButtonConfirm.Hint
resource.object: Confirms all changes and saved to database.

resource.name: barButtonValidate.Hint
resource.object: Lets the Multihead weigherr check if the current program is valid.

resource.name: barButtonActivate.Hint
resource.object: Update the current active program on the Multihead weigher.

resource.name: chkBtnHeaderModeToggle.Tooltip
resource.object: Switch between viewing program headers as panel or grid

resource.name: MsgBoxTxt_TheNumberOfProductsIsNotValidForChosenProgramType
resource.object: The number of products is not valid for chosen program type

resource.name: MsgBoxTxt_TheNumberofSubProductsMustBeNumeric
resource.object: The number of sub products must be numeric

resource.name: MsgBoxTxt_ThereAreNoMultiHeadProcessUnitDefinedAProcessUnitIsRequired
resource.object: There are no process units defined for MultiHead, a process unit is required

resource.name: MsgBoxTxt_InnovaProductMustBeSelected
resource.object: All Innova Products must be selected

resource.name: Validate_ProgramOfUnknownType
resource.object: Program of unknown type (must be Single, Mixed, MultiJob)

resource.name: Validate_NumberOfProductsAreInvalidForAProgramOfType
resource.object: Number of products are invalid for a program of type

resource.name: Validate_IsLessThanMinValueOn
resource.object: is less than min. value on

resource.name: Validate_InvalidProductNoParamOrValueRecords
resource.object: Invalid product, either no param records or no valuerecords

resource.name: Validation_TheResultFromValidationOnTheDevice
resource.object: The result from the validation on the device

resource.name: Validation_ErrorPerformingTheValidationOnTheDevice
resource.object: Error performing the validation on the device

resource.name: MsgBoxTxt_ErrorValidatingDataCheckLogForDetails
resource.object: Error validating data, check log for details

resource.name: MsgBoxTxt_ErrorSavingDataCheckLogForDetails
resource.object: Error saving data, check log for details

resource.name: MsgBoxTxt_CanNotPasteIntoSameStationMakeACloneInstead
resource.object: Can not paste into same station, make a clone insted ?

resource.name: Communic_TheSelectedDeviceIsNotOnLine
resource.object: The selected device is not online

resource.name: Communic_TheSelectedDeviceIsNotInitializedByService
resource.object: The selected device is not initialized by the service

resource.name: Communic_ExceptionInProgramExecutionWhileCommunicatingWithServiceSeeLogForDetails
resource.object: Exception in program execution, while communicating with service, see log for details

resource.name: Communic_ErrorInStationConfigurationTerminalNotSetToAMultiHeadDevice
resource.object: Error in station configuration - terminal value not set to a multihead device

resource.name: MsgBoxTxt_AreYouSureYouWantToDeleteTheProgram
resource.object: Are you sure you want to delete the program

resource.name: MsgBoxTxt_ErrorCreatingAProgramSeeLogForDetails
resource.object: Error creating a program, see log for details

resource.name: MsgBoxTxt_ProgramIsValidatedNoErrorsFound
resource.object: Program is validated, no errors found

resource.name: MsgBoxTxt_ErrorActivatingProgramNoContactWithProcessUnitOnServer
resource.object: Error activating program, No contact with process unit on server

resource.name: MsgBoxTxt_ErrorActivatingProgramProgramNeedsToBeValidatedOrExported
resource.object: Error activating program, program needs to be validated or exported

resource.name: MsgBoxTxt_DoYouWantToChangeProgramOnTheMachine
resource.object: Do you want to change program on the machine

resource.name: MsgBoxTxt_ErrorActivatingProgramCheckLogForDetails
resource.object: Error activating program, check log for details

resource.name: MsgBoxTxt_CannotBeDeletedBecauseItIsActive
resource.object: cannot be deleted, because it is active

resource.name: PrgStatus.SyncProgramError
resource.object: Error occured when synchronizing program with MultiHead

resource.name: PrgStatus.ExportProgramNoProgramNumber
resource.object: Failed to export program due to missing program number

resource.name: PrgStatus.ExportProgramTooManyProducts
resource.object: Failed to export program due to too many products defined in program

resource.name: PrgStatus.ExportProgramNoProduct
resource.object: Failed to export program due to no valid product defined in program

resource.name: Info.SelectExportDevice
resource.object: Select device to export program(s) to:

resource.name: Info.SelectImportDevice
resource.object: Select device to import program(s) from:

resource.name: DialogTitle
resource.object: Please enter name and select process unit for the new program

resource.name: labelWarning.Text
resource.object: Are you sure you want to delete the selected programs?

resource.name: NoOrdersFound
resource.object: No orders found when executing SelectOrderUO.

resource.name: GettingOrdersDefault
resource.object: Getting orders from default SelectOrder UO.

resource.name: Toolbox.PackingStationOverview.Hint
resource.object: Overview of whats going through the packing stations

resource.name: CurrentProduct
resource.object: Current product not in product list

resource.name: NextProduct
resource.object: Next product not in product list

resource.name: NoQCProcedure
resource.object: No inspection procedure defined for product

resource.name: DeleteQueue
resource.object: Do you want to remove item from queue?

resource.name: DeletItem
resource.object: Do you want to delete item?

resource.name: DeleteWarningAllItemsMsg
resource.object: Are you sure you want to remove all items?

resource.name: DeleteWarningItemMsg
resource.object: Do you want to remove item?
